## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (0 failures, 0 warnings)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] All commits are signed off (DCO: `git commit -s`)
- [ ] SPDX license headers present on new files
- [ ] SPDX identifier matches directory:
  - `Apache-2.0` for `lang/crates/` (except codegen)
  - `BUSL-1.1` for `lang/crates/synoema-codegen/` and `tools/`
  - `MIT-0` for `examples/`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / benchmarks
- [ ] Language spec change
